creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Tijl reports: You can set a lower bound with e.g. `sysctl 
debug.cpufreq.lowest=600`, this should be enough to configure what the 
submitter is willing to do. I forwarded Tijl's reply to arch to have it 
discussed there and perhaps implement his idea about that.
